transcript.content: 当前问题汇总已经写入开发日志：[2026-04-19-clarify-host-level-context-minor-gc-acceptance-and-openclaw-feasibility.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/docs/devlog/2026-04-19-clarify-host-level-context-minor-gc-acceptance-and…
你刚才验证后，openclaw 是否达到了我们认为的用户端明显可用么/？ 整体的context 大小有明显的下降么？ （切不同话题）
还不能这么说。按我们刚才真正验证到的东西，答案是： - `OpenClaw 还不能判定为“用户端已经明显可用”` - `也没有证据证明整体 context 在切不同话题后有明显下降`

我们现在的任务是 深入的测试openclaw的 gc，是否能够达标；，尽量更长的对话（可以做临时数据写入，但是不要对我其他文档做写入操作）；做好探针，记录好相关数据；预期是：更长的对话，如果正常情况下，可能要做compact了，但是因为又了gc，实际不需要compact；同时在一个同一话题的长对话后切换话题，应该有明显的context回落；这里的context指的是实际发给llm的数据； 接下来你来策划这个测试，把相关配置都做好，然后就开始测试吧，最终简明扼要的给我结果和分析；

结论先说：**OpenClaw 现在已经能实打实地压住发给 LLM 的 prompt，但还没有达到“用户明显感觉切题后 context 明显回落、基本不用再考虑 compact”的标准。** 这轮我补了专门的长会话探针： - 脚本：[eval-openclaw-guarded-session-probe.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/scripts/eval-openc…
从新review下测试脚本， 没有问题的话，就要分析为什么没有明显回落，分析原因，找到解决方案；然后解决掉；

我先 review 了测试脚本和 guarded 主路径，结论是脚本口径基本没问题，问题主要在实现本身。 核心原因有两个： - [src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js) 里 `maxTurns=12`…
因为现在主矛盾已经变了，不是“有没有证据证明方向对”，而是“这个方向的代价能不能接受”。 具体说有三点：
这轮修复后，最明显的新问题不是答案错，也不是完全不降，而是：• 采样窗口一放大• guarded/runtime 成本就明显上升• stress 场景跑得很慢 ==》什么原因？

主要有 4 个原因。 1. `maxTurns` 修正后，shadow 输入直接变大了。 在 [dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js:88) 里，原来实际上只取最近 `12` 条消息；修正后变成最近 `12`…
可以，继续一口气长任务把刚才你说的做完；

decision.archive_summary: Active thread is a long-running investigation of OpenClaw GC effectiveness on real LLM prompt size. Earlier validation established that OpenClaw was not yet clearly 'user-obviously usable' and did not show a clear context drop after topic switch. The user then set the main task: deeply test OpenClaw GC with longer conversations, add probes, record data, avoid writing to unrelated docs, and aim to show that GC reduces the need for compact and causes a noticeable prompt-context drop when switching topics. After script/runtime review, the diagnosis shifted from test-script validity to implementation/runtime behavior and then to a new bottleneck: after the latest fixes, widening the sampling window makes guarded/runtime cost rise sharply and stress runs become slow. The current task is to continue from that diagnosis, analyze the cause of the slowdown and lack of obvious drop, find a solution, and implement it in one go.
decision.reasoning_summary: Use continue because the latest user turn explicitly asks to keep going on the same unresolved task from the immediately preceding diagnosis. Keep recent raw evidence around the performance-regression question and its answer (`t10`,`t11`), and likely also the nearby task-setting/review turns (`t6`,`t7`) in the next-turn working set. Evict older resolved status/reporting turns and the side explanation exchange (`t8`,`t9`). Preserve `t4` as a semantic pin because it contains durable task constraints and success criteria that still matter, even if its raw text can leave the prompt.
